data.text/markdown:
Label Imputation — KNNLabelImputer & TargetImputer

Handles the missing label problem: a portion of your population has unknown outcomes and can't be used directly for supervised training. Common scenarios:
  • Loan applicants who were rejected — their default status is never observed
  • Holdout/control groups in A/B tests
  • Records from before a new monitoring system was deployed

Workflow

Labeled data ──► KNNLabelImputer.fit()
Unlabeled data ─► KNNLabelImputer.predict_proba() → p̂ per unlabeled record
                ─► KNNLabelImputer.transform()    → rows with imputed target + weight
Then combine labeled + imputed unlabeled rows for training.

data.text/markdown:
KNNLabelImputer

Finds k nearest labeled neighbors in feature space for each unlabeled record. Distance-weighted average of neighbor labels gives P(event).

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='PKri-0' random-id='97165441-6208-2bfb-0aa3-091903865106'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='null' data-data='"[{\"record\":0,\"p_event\":0.6955},{\"record\":1,\"p_event\":0.0},{\"record\":2,\"p_event\":0.0},{\"record\":3,\"p_event\":0.8343},{\"record\":4,\"p_event\":0.0}]"' data-total-rows='5' data-total-columns='2' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-field-types='[["record",["integer","i64"]],["p_event",["number","f64"]]]' data-show-filters='true' data-show-download='true' data-show-column-summaries='false' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='false' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false' data-download-file-name='"df"'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown:
transform() — weighted duplication

method="weighted" duplicates each unlabeled record into two rows: one with target=1 (weight = p̂) and one with target=0 (weight = 1 − p̂). This preserves expected event count while keeping all records in training.

data.text/markdown: Total weight of imputed rows: 200.0 (= 200 unlabeled records × 2)

TargetImputer — standalone target assignment

When you already have probabilities from another source (e.g., a propensity model) and just need to convert them to training rows. Three strategies:
Method Behaviour
"weighted" Duplicate each row: (target=1, w=p) + (target=0, w=1-p)
"randomized" Bernoulli draw: single row, target ∈ {0,1}
"cutoff" Hard threshold at cutoff (default 0.5)
